{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = G-39s
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[G-39s]] are immortal prototypes that can return from death.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[G-39s]] have been on trucks for testing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
